trigger_def: CREATE CONSTRAINT TRIGGER "RI_ConstraintTrigger_a_17353" AFTER DELETE ON public.contacts FROM notes NOT DEFERRABLE INITIALLY IMMEDIATE FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION "RI_FKey_cascade_del"()
CREATE CONSTRAINT TRIGGER "RI_ConstraintTrigger_a_17354" AFTER UPDATE ON public.contacts FROM notes NOT DEFERRABLE INITIALLY IMMEDIATE FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION "RI_FKey_noaction_upd"()
CREATE CONSTRAINT TRIGGER "RI_ConstraintTrigger_c_17292" AFTER INSERT ON public.contacts FROM auth.users NOT DEFERRABLE INITIALLY IMMEDIATE FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION "RI_FKey_check_ins"()
CREATE CONSTRAINT TRIGGER "RI_ConstraintTrigger_c_17293" AFTER UPDATE ON public.contacts FROM auth.users NOT DEFERRABLE INITIALLY IMMEDIATE FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION "RI_FKey_check_upd"()
CREATE TRIGGER update_contacts_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON public.contacts FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column()
